calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Uncontested Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Alba Marina Ingram, Transferor, And Allstate Settlement Corporation, Transferee, Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134 Et Seq.
Off Calendar May-09-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. PAUL M. GELB OF DRINKER, BIDDLE & REATH LLP, TEL. NO. 1-310-203-4028 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ALBA INGRAM, TEL. NO. 1-415-503-8685 PETITIONER ALSO PRESENT IN COURT.

RULING - THE COURT INQUIRED WHETHER MS.INGRAM KNOWS WHAT SHE IS GIVING UP AND THE AMOUNT SHE IS GETTING INCLUDING THE INTEREST RATE INVOLVED. THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER IN RE ALMA MARINA INGRAM'S Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Alba Marina Ingram, Transferor, And Allstate Settlement Corporation, Transferee, Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134 is Granted. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189
